description_long: This is a wooden storage box with a square shape and reinforced edges, featuring a visible wood grain texture throughout its surfaces. The box has a deep, open top, suggesting it is designed for easy access and storage of various items. One side of the box is marked with a large, red painted cross, possibly indicating medical or emergency use, while another side displays greenish markings that may serve as identification or decoration. The remaining sides are plain, showing only the natural wood grain. The box appears sturdy and robust, suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, warehouses, or street corners. Its construction suggests it can support moderate weight and is intended for repeated handling and stacking.
description: A sturdy, square wooden storage box with visible wood grain, reinforced edges, and distinctive red and green markings on two sides.
description_view_0: This side features greenish painted markings over the wood grain, giving it a distinctive, possibly coded appearance.
description_view_1: This side is plain, showing only the natural wood grain with no additional markings or paint.
description_view_2: Another plain side, similar to view 1, with only the wood grain visible and no painted features.
description_view_3: This side is marked with a large, red painted cross, suggesting a special purpose such as medical or emergency storage.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: painted red cross, green painted markings
